memory:memory/2026-03-31.md:21:58.snippet: ## Key Findings (Onboarding Prototype v4) ### 🔴 Universal (all 3 flagged) 1. Sync mode = conversion killer ("requires new org" terrifies users, 40-50% quit risk for non-accountants) 2. Jargon never explained (reconcile, journal entries, COGS) 3. Revenue field feels invasive — no explanation of why it's needed ### Accountant-specific - No multi-client scalability info - Missing Chart of Accounts mapping - Landing page ignores accountant audience - No cash vs accrual question ### Business owner-specific - Sage Intacct/NetSuite make small sellers feel "wrong place" - "Select all that apply" missing on platforms - "Intuit" SSO — doesn't know that's QuickBooks ### Quick wins (Viktor) - Add "~

memory:memory/2026-04-16.md:1:29.snippet: # 2026-04-16 ## Morning Idea — Accessibility/Edge Case - **Topic:** Progressive enhancement for pricing yearly toggle - **Angle:** Accessibility/edge case (from April 15 pricing prototype) - **Idea:** Show both prices in HTML (monthly strikethrough + yearly bold), then use JS to collapse into toggle. No JS = users still see the 20% OFF deal. Helps screen readers, ad blockers, crawlers. Zero visual change for 99%, full information for the 1% with JS failures. - **Built on:** April 15 pricing prototype — yearly toggle with "20% OFF" badge assumes JS works; edge case is invisible broken experience ## Pricing Prototype — 5 Variants Complete (4:00 PM) Built 5 pricing page variants for Synder'
